original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Practice Advisory for Intraoperative Awareness and Brain Function Monitoring
original_registry_entry.population: Patients receiving general anesthesia, with risk-factor and reported-awareness qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Preoperative risk assessment and post-event interview, documentation, and support after a report of intraoperative awareness.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting previous awareness, focused record and interview review, selected risk discussion, post-event structured interview, occurrence reporting, and offered counseling or support. It is old, is not a guideline or standard, and does not establish that awareness occurred.

exact_sections.heading: Preoperative evaluation and Appendix 1 summary
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports review of records, interview about previous anesthesia experiences including prior awareness, focused risk assessment, and informing selected higher-risk patients without predicting awareness.

exact_sections.heading: Postoperative interventions and Appendix 1 summary
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports a structured interview after a reported event, documenting the account, offering counseling or psychological support, and completing an occurrence report without confirming causation.

title: Practice Advisory for Intraoperative Awareness and Brain Function Monitoring
population: Patients receiving general anesthesia, with risk-factor and reported-awareness qualifiers.
intended_setting: Preoperative risk assessment and post-event interview, documentation, and support after a report of intraoperative awareness.
access_limitations: One or more PDF tables require structured extraction
Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
